inputDescription: Generate a bcrypt hash locally with a fresh random salt each time.
costDescription: Higher cost values are slower and harder to brute-force. This browser tool limits cost to 4-15.
costInvalidMessage: Enter a whole number from 4 to 15.
outputDescription: The output includes the bcrypt version, cost, salt, and checksum in the standard hash string.
emptyDescription: Enter a password and choose a cost factor, then generate a hash.
privacyNote: The password is never saved and hashing runs in this browser.
